changes.summary: New Phase 5 use cases: GetCommunityFeedUseCase (hub feed fetch + pagination), ToggleFavoriteUseCase, MarkNotificationsReadUseCase; shared mapPublicationsAndPollsToFeedItems via EntityMappers with toPublicationFeedItem/toPollFeedItem adapters; buildDomainFeedMaps, buildFeedItemLookupMaps, sortFeedItems; FeedOptions type; factory helpers.
Retired ~300 lines of inline P-2 feed mappers; delegates getCommunityFeed to GetCommunityFeedUseCase; keeps countHubFeedPosts; re-exports FeedOptions.

add/remove/markAsViewed route through ToggleFavoriteUseCase and MarkNotificationsReadUseCase; getAll uses buildFeedItemLookupMaps + EntityMappers path instead of inline PublicationFeedItem/PollFeedItem construction.

notes: Domain CommunityFeedService imports application use case (transitional). communities.router still calls communityFeedService.getCommunityFeed unchanged. Favorites getAll still loads entities from Mongo directly; mapping unified via EntityMappers. Follow-up: register use cases in application/_bootstrap.ts; migrate community feed user fetch to batch enrichment services.
